name: Free Mission Control for OpenClaw AI Agents
description: JARVIS Mission Control v2 — a free, self-hosted command center for OpenClaw AI agents. Kanban board, real-time chat, Claude Code session tracking, GitHub Issues sync, webhook delivery monitoring, CLI console, agent SOUL editor, and a full Matrix-themed dashboard. Self-host from GitHub or connect to MissionDeck.ai.
author: Asif2BD
changelog: v2.0.8: Performance fix — surgical O(1) cache updates for /api/tasks. Eliminates 6000ms+ response times caused by full cache invalidation on every file write. New updateCacheItem() updates individual items in-place; 5-min TTL safety net. v2.0.3: Smart slide-out panels for Chat (real-time WebSocket), Reports, and Schedules. Fixed panel CSS transition bug. v2.0.2: Right sidebar UX fixes, double /api/ URL bug, chat overflow fix. v2.0.1: Dark mode hardcoded as default. v2.0.0: Major UI overhaul — widget cards, enhanced task cards, collapsible sidebar, Matrix theme polish. v1.10.0-v1.14.0: Webhook retry + circuit breaker + SQLite delivery log. v1.12.0: 51-test Jest suite. v1.9.0: Pino structured logging. v1.7.0: Rate limiting. v1.6.0: CSRF protection.
